description_long: This figure depicts an adult pedestrian with a striking and unconventional appearance, featuring a horned mask or helmet with intricate sculptural details and a high ponytail. The individual is dressed in a loose, short-sleeved shirt adorned with large gold chains and a prominent bandana covering the lower face. Visible tattoos cover both forearms, and the person wears fingerless gloves, knee-length shorts, and high-top sneakers. The back of the shirt displays a large, stylized gold graphic. The overall look combines urban streetwear with fantasy or tribal influences, making the character visually distinctive and memorable.
description: A masked adult pedestrian in urban streetwear with gold chains, tattoos, and a horned helmet, blending street style with fantasy elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the horned mask, gold chains, bandana, tattoos, and full outfit details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the horned helmet, ponytail, and arm tattoos.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large gold graphic on the shirt and the back of the helmet and ponytail.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the side profile of the mask, ponytail, and arm tattoos.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with a loose short-sleeved shirt, knee-length shorts, fingerless gloves, and a bandana
attribute_hairstyle: long hair tied in a high ponytail
